positionAssessments.position: P1 — Maximal proof burden: proof-carrying source (writer emits SPARK-grade checked annotations everywhere; compiler is checker-only, never infers)
positionAssessments.strengths: Its core insight survives the critique and refutes P2's dissolution move: for checker-underivable facts (loop invariants, value-dependent disjointness, trip counts, ranges — exactly A005's consumer list), writer statement is fact-CREATING, the only route past the decidability cap, because verification is cheaper than synthesis; the spine's stated-and-checked arm exists for precisely this. Its soundness is invariant to the unknown writer error-rate ε — false facts are compile errors, never miscompiles — so its failure currency (repair iterations) is recoverable where P2's (forfeited facts) is not. It moves nearly all fact mass into the one tier all round-1 positions agreed is assumable in every build mode. Concessions were the most honest in the debate (weak-annotation equilibrium, checker-TCB growth, one-way door).
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Four landed blows, two fatal to the position as written. (1) The 'compiler never infers optimizer-consumable facts' pillar violates decided law, not an amendable edge: round2-metaprogramming/synthesis mandates 'facts about constant data are compiler-derived by inspection, never writer-asserted' — the opposite polarity for an entire fact class. (2) The canonical-form conflict is structural and unrebutted: invariant equivalence is undecidable, so 'one spelling per semantic construct' cannot extend to a proof surface; equivalent-but-differently-spelled invariants are distinct canonical bytes, breaking drift-diffing and content-addressed caching under regeneration-heavy writers. (3) Its economic premise 'every fact stated costs only tokens, priced at zero' is now contrary to directive law: D2 (2026-07-02) amends 'verbosity is free' — proof-carrying source maximizes both SPEC budget (an invariant/VC vocabulary must be taught in-context to a model with zero training data) and PROGRAM budget; no party briefed this. (4) Proof-of-consistency is not proof-of-intent: a dischargeability-optimizing writer selects invariants provable from the same plan that produced the code, making weakening-laundering the plausible equilibrium, so the claimed fact-density gain is an unproven upper bound purchased with the largest one-way door. Mechanism family has zero corpus cards (no Dafny/Why3/F*/PCC), and deterministic resource-bounded discharge is undesigned. Survives only as the maximal setting of an optional checked channel, not as a mandate.

positionAssessments.position: P2 — Rust-division: writer states intent at boundaries (decided floors); compiler carries the entire derivation burden; writer-stated facts beyond the floor are optional checked redundancy, never trusted
positionAssessments.strengths: It is the fixed point of decided law: boundary-explicit intent, zero cross-boundary inference, deterministic ambiguity-rejecting interior synthesis, optional cross-checked redundancy with mismatch-as-hard-error, and contract-edit gating are all already round-2 floors — this position adds nothing and removes nothing. It is the only regime whose every load-bearing mechanism has adversarially-verified existence proofs at the D1 bar, and the 2026-07-02 verification file STRENGTHENS it beyond its own brief: C004 is now CONFIRMED_WITH_AMENDED_SOURCES and D001 CONFIRMED (the position understated its own evidence). Deterministic accept/reject preserves content-addressed memoization and the machine repair loop. Post-D2 it has a structural advantage no one argued: compiler-carried burden spends compute, not context budget. It is forward-compatible with every experimental outcome — if redundancy-independence mandates interior annotations they move from optional to mandatory channel without re-architecture; a solver pass can be added later as a fact-promotion stage without changing the writer contract.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Its central dissolution move — 'writer proof burden can NEVER buy trust, only redundancy' — is refuted for checker-underivable facts, where a statement is the enabling input that converts an underivable fact into a checkable one; the position therefore caps the reachable fact set at deterministic-analysis decidability, a PERMANENT performance forfeiture under D0's extreme-performance mandate that it prices at zero (conceding only 'restructure loops'). Its laundering argument is a category error (interior invariant weakening is strength-erosion, a performance event, not the soundness-laundering gating exists to stop). Its determinism indictment attacks prove-or-reject (F006-style), not P3's actual prove-or-check-or-omit design. The boundary-independence claim doing the mandatory-vs-optional work (caller/callee generated in different contexts) is itself an exempted EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED writer-behavior claim. D009 — its silent-degradation exhibit — remains genuinely unverified, and the effect-row leg of its intent floor has zero exemplar cards (Cyclone/MLKit/Koka/DPJ, a named blocking obligation). Frontier size past borrow-checkability is unmeasured and is the decisive variable.

positionAssessments.position: P3 — Solver-assisted obligations: writer states only the floor facts plus optional checked hints; compiler generates residual obligations; a budgeted deterministic prover promotes what it discharges; residue falls to runtime-check or sound omission
positionAssessments.strengths: Correctly reframes burden as an elastic dial that is sound at every setting: budget exhaustion moves an obligation from proven to checked to omitted — always a performance event, never a soundness event — and every carded fact channel has a sound omission fallback (N002 unflagged, N004, N005 non-inbounds). Its tier-3 fallback matches round-1 violation-semantics' amended leading candidate (A005 runtime checks + versioning), and it is the only position with a post-violation observability story (C002 precedent under trap=abort). Routing burden to toolchain compute is the one cost channel that remains cleanly admissible even after D2 (CPU, not context tokens). Its hint channel generalizes the already-decided redundancy-as-hallucination-checksum machinery, and hints, being solver-checked, can enlarge but never poison the proven set.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Three design holes, one internal contradiction. (1) 'The solver never touches the D1 envelope' contradicts its own payoff claim: if solver-discharged facts ever elide safety-relevant runtime checks (the check-elision payoff it prices), a solver soundness bug is a D1-class breach — the architectural fence is asserted, undesigned, and incompatible with the payoff; either forfeit elision or admit the solver into the D1 trust path. (2) The undischarged-hint semantics create exactly the spine-forbidden third state or nondeterministic acceptance across solver versions — breaking canonical determinism and memoization — and the position never legislates which. (3) Its distinctive tier has zero corpus cards: F006 evidences prover-enforced RESTRICTION (decidability bought by bans), not budgeted SMT discharge of arithmetic/disjointness obligations, and the single number its coverage story depends on (SPARK discharge rates) is listed as missing/blocking. 'Prove-or-check-or-omit exhausts the sound design space' overclaims (the offline-profile channel is alive; A005 is itself static speculation-with-fallback). TCB enlargement runs against the metaprogramming verdict's confirmed restriction pattern, and performance nondeterminism collides with the unresolved predictable-cost-model charter question.

keyTradeoffs: Fact-creation vs error-surface at the high-value frontier (the P1/P2 head-on collision the decided law does not settle): writer statement is the only route past checker decidability to the top-payoff facts (dependence-freedom, disjointness, trip counts, purity), but statement quality under a correlated, dischargeability-optimizing writer is unproven — 'stated-and-checked' is simultaneously the channel P1 maximizes and P2 caps at boundaries, and the verification spine blesses both readings.

Failure-currency choice under unknown writer error-rate ε: all three regimes are D1-sound by construction, so proof burden is the dial that selects WHICH currency is paid — recoverable compile-loop explosion (P1), permanent conservative performance forfeiture (P2), or trusted-computing-base growth plus nondeterministic performance (P3) — and the corpus cannot rank these currencies today.

Deterministic acceptance vs discharge power: borrow-checking-class analysis gives stable accept/reject, machine-actionable blame, and memoizable checking; solver assistance widens fact coverage but must be fenced out of the acceptance decision (fact-promotion only) or budget nondeterminism breaks canonical determinism — the hint channel is where this fence currently fails.

Canonicalizability of the proof surface: invariants have unboundedly many logically-equivalent spellings and equivalence is undecidable, so any mandatory proof-carrying surface conflicts with one-spelling-per-construct, drift-diffing, and content-addressed caching; proof density beyond the floor must live outside the byte-canonical source or under new undesigned spelling rules.

Post-D2 budget repricing (unbriefed by all parties): verbosity is no longer free — writer-carried proof burden spends finite SPEC budget (teaching the annotation vocabulary in-context) and PROGRAM budget (emitting it per code unit), while compiler/solver-carried burden spends admissible compute; D2 structurally favors compiler-carried derivation and makes maximal mandatory annotation density a directive-law problem, not just an unmeasured cost.

Uniform regime vs per-fact-class decomposition: bounds/overflow (per-operation checkable), loop-bounded disjointness (runtime-checkable via A005 only), whole-execution noalias and purity/laws (static-only evidence, no dynamic check) differ in derivability, statability, and checkability — round-1 already warned one policy per contract class may be a category error, and a per-class burden table is the likely true shape of the answer.

Monotone coupling with the escape-hatch sibling: higher mandatory burden, higher conservative-rejection rates, or budget cliffs all raise pressure into the unsafe/FFI region; deciding proof burden and escape-hatch friction independently can produce the worst composite (maximal burden + cheap escape reverses the intended fact-density gain).
evidenceGaps: Zero AI-codegen evidence cards anywhere in the corpus — every writer-behavior claim on every side (invariant quality, correlated wrongness, weakening equilibrium, repair rates on VC vs type-error vs restructure diagnostics) is EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED; the AI VC-repair-loop experiment is absent from the round-2 experiment program entirely.

Stale-evidence split confirmed by inspection of notes/card-verification-2026-07-02.jsonl: D001, D002, D003, D005, D007, C004 (amended scope: data races prevented, general race conditions not), J004, A001, A002, A006 are now CONFIRMED — but the cards doing the heaviest work in THIS debate (A005: every position's fallback; D009: P2's boundary-mandate exhibit; A003, D010, J001/J002, C002, C005) carry no verification votes.

No proof-burden exemplars beyond F006, and F006 evidences restriction (decidability bought by bans), not general discharge: no SPARK/gnatprove discharge-rate or annotation-density data (listed missing/blocking in the backlog), no Dafny/Why3/F*/PCC cards, zero region/effect-verifier cards (Cyclone/MLKit/Koka/DPJ — named blocking obligation) for the effect-row floor every position assumes.

No quantified performance payoff for ANY fact-density level (F002 negative scope; caveats.md): the entire benefit side of every position is payoff-in-kind; the three-way benchmark (UB-asserted vs runtime-checked+versioned vs proof-gated kernels) named the single most decision-capable missing artifact still does not exist, nor does any end-to-end measurement that checked source facts survive lowering and fire optimizations.

Frontier sizing unmeasured (round-1 aliasing gap, still open): what fraction of performance-critical code exceeds borrow-checkable/dischargeable coverage — the variable that decides whether added writer burden buys performance where D0 wants it or forfeits it.

Solver-in-compile-loop engineering uncarded: deterministic resource budgets (rlimit vs wall-clock), proof-cache hit rates under regeneration-heavy writers, proof-producing-solver-plus-small-checker TCB architecture, machine-actionability of undischarged-obligation diagnostics.

Obligation-generation completeness — the SHARED soundness surface across all three regimes (a missed obligation class is a hole no checker or prover closes) — has no cards and no validation plan, though it dominates every position's soundness story.

D2 budget pricing (new gap, post-directive): the SPEC-budget cost of teaching each annotation-vocabulary tier in-context and the PROGRAM-budget cost per burden level are unmeasured; no position's economics were computed against the amended verbosity law.

FFI fact-attenuation remains undesigned while the spine taken literally forbids attenuated facts (neither stated-and-checked nor checker-derived) — the proof-burden ruling must legislate the exception class, and every position's 'shrinks toward the FFI wall' rhetoric is unpriced until it does.
result.leadingCandidate: Amended Rust-division (P2) as the mandatory floor, with an elastic checked channel above it. Mandatory writer burden = exactly the round-2 decided floors and nothing more: intent facts (ownership/aliasing capability, effect row, numeric mode, ABI-visible layout) at every signature/interface/instantiation, plus writer-stated storage/lifetime contracts at allocations; the compiler carries all derivation; nothing writer-stated is ever trusted unchecked. Three amendments forced by the critique: (1) P2's 'statement never creates facts' claim is struck — a stated-and-checked writer channel for checker-underivable facts (loop invariants, ranges, disjointness, law obligations) is retained as OPTIONAL, per-fact-class, pending the extended redundancy-independence and proof-ladder experiments; (2) a deterministically-budgeted solver pass is admissible only as a fact-PROMOTION stage that never gates program acceptance and never elides safety-relevant checks until a proof-checker TCB design exists (P3 absorbed with its third-state hint hole to be legislated); (3) proof density beyond the floor is a tunable coverage/performance parameter, not a trust decision — P1 survives only as the maximal setting of the optional channel and is ineligible as a mandate (metaprogramming-law violation as written, non-canonicalizable proof surface, and D2's amended verbosity budget).
result.rationale: Decisive where law forces it: D1 plus the verification spine settle the trust question completely — no writer-stated fact is ever load-bearing unchecked, so proof burden is not a soundness dial in any position, and the mandatory writer surface today can only be the already-decided floors, because mandating more requires writer-behavior evidence the corpus states it has zero of. That skeleton is P2, the only regime whose every mechanism has adversarially-verified existence proofs (F001 3-0; C004 and D001 now CONFIRMED per the 2026-07-02 verification file, which I inspected — the newly-verified cards strengthen rather than reverse the leader, distinguishing this from round-1 violation-semantics' research_needed posture), and the only one forward-compatible with every experiment outcome. But P2 cannot stand unamended: the critic's sharpest point is verified against the spine's own text — 'stated-and-checked' is fact-creating for checker-underivable facts, so P2's decidability cap is a permanent D0 performance forfeiture it never prices, and the highest-value optimizer facts live exactly there. P1's density and P3's solver are therefore retained as the elastic, optional, always-checked layer above the floor — P1 is barred as a mandate on three independent grounds (it violates the decided compiler-derived-constant-facts law as literally stated; a proof surface is non-canonicalizable, colliding with one-spelling-per-construct and content-addressed caching; and D2, dated 2026-07-02 in user-directives.md, amends the 'verbosity is free' premise this debate was framed on, converting its token-cost-zero economics into a directive-law violation no party briefed). P3's lattice is architecturally attractive and D2-friendly (compute, not context) but design-incomplete at two soundness-adjacent points (the check-elision/TCB contradiction and the undischarged-hint third state), so it enters as a fenced promotion stage, not a regime. Honest where evidence is thin: whether the optional channel becomes mandatory per fact class, how much the solver actually discharges, and whether an AI writer can supply useful checked invariants at all are the deciding variables, and they have literally zero cards — hence design_candidate_later, not a decision, with the choice of failure currency under unknown writer error-rate (recoverable iterations vs permanent forfeiture vs TCB growth) explicitly deferred to the experiment program.
followUps: Enter the amended baseline as the round-3 carry-forward: mandatory writer burden = the decided floors only; one optional stated-and-checked channel above it, per-fact-class (bounds, overflow, loop-bounded disjointness, whole-execution noalias, purity/laws, ranges), each class tagged with derivability/statability/runtime-checkability — replacing the uniform-regime framing all three positions used, per round-1's category-error warning.

Apply the round-1 stale-evidence remedy before hardening: adversarially verify A005 (every position's fallback mechanism), D009 (P2's boundary exhibit), A003, D010, J001/J002, C002, C005; update all debate records to the card-verification-2026-07-02.jsonl state (C004 amended scope must be carried wherever it is cited as D1 discharge).

Run the proof-burden-ladder benchmark: identical kernels under boundary-only vs +mandatory interior annotations vs +invariants/solver-discharge; measure fact coverage delivered, runtime delta, tokens generated/re-read priced against D2's SPEC and PROGRAM budgets, and iterations-to-green — this operationalizes the P1/P2 fact-density collision and P3's tier-2/tier-3 boundary.

Extend the redundancy-independence experiment from type annotations to invariant/range/effect/transfer annotations: catch-rate vs correlated-wrongness vs friction, plus a weak-annotation-equilibrium probe (do unattended writers emit strong or trivially-provable invariants under lint pressure — the P1 laundering equilibrium test).

Add the missing AI VC-repair-loop experiment to the round-2/3 program: fix success rate and latency on failed-obligation diagnostics vs type errors vs conservative-rejection restructure demands — the false-REJECTION economics no position designs and no current experiment measures.

Legislate solver placement before P3 is admissible in any form: solver may only promote facts on the performance ledger, never gate acceptance; define undischarged-hint semantics (the current third-state hole) and the check-elision fence (solver-discharged facts may not elide safety-relevant checks pending a proof-producing-solver + small-independent-checker TCB design); require deterministic resource limits (rlimit-class, pinned versions) with the discharge ledger as a governed build artifact.

Rule on proof-surface canonicalizability: either specify canonical spelling rules for any proof-annotation vocabulary or store hints as a separate non-canonical artifact outside the byte-canonical source — a precondition for the optional channel to exist at all under the syntax floor.

Decide proof burden JOINTLY with the escape-hatch and FFI-attenuation siblings: model the burden-level x escape-friction composite (marking-metastasis risk), and legislate the FFI exception to the spine's no-third-state rule that every position currently cites past.

Design the contract-edit gating policy for the optional proof channel: gated invariants stall repair loops, ungated ones permit silent strength erosion — propose the split (gate boundary-visible contracts, version-and-report interior invariant weakening as a lint-class performance event, consistent with the strength-erosion/soundness-laundering distinction).

Card the missing mechanism families: SPARK/gnatprove discharge rates and annotation density (backlog-blocking), Dafny/Why3/F*/PCC exemplars, region/effect verifiers (Cyclone/MLKit/Koka/DPJ) for the effect-row floor, and an obligation-generation-completeness validation plan (Alive2-style) as the shared TCB core across all regimes.

Price D2 explicitly for this topic: measure the one-time SPEC-budget cost of teaching each annotation-vocabulary tier in-context and the per-unit PROGRAM-budget cost of each burden level — the amended-verbosity constraint invalidates every 'tokens are free' argument in the record and no experiment currently measures it.

positionAssessments.position: Position 1 — Memory quarantine (copies + opaque handles; foreign arena; no LangHeap pointer crosses)
positionAssessments.strengths: Its core insight survives critique intact: because retention by foreign code is unverifiable (threat-model FFI row: verify 'no'), attenuation is monotone and permanent, so the only sound shapes are withdrawal or emptiness of the quantification domain. Its residency mechanism is the piece decided floors actually ratify — 'foreign-shared' as a writer-stated, allocation-site storage contract is one field on the existing round-2 memory floor, and it is exactly what P3's demotion becomes once repaired to respect the explicit-storage-contract and zero-cross-boundary-inference floors. It converts the boundary obligation into a syntactic check (no lang pointer in extern signatures) rather than a trusted semantic claim, which is the only shape compatible with the verification spine as written. Concessions were unusually honest (copy costs unquantified, ABI-axiom floor, erosion pressure, provenance coupling), and its framing of arena residency as 'relocating and pricing the tradeoff per-object by explicit writer choice' is the correct honest core.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: The headline theorem — attenuation identically zero, domain empty — is falsified by the position's own machinery, as the critic showed: copy buffers must be arena-resident (an unstated, unpriced double-copy discipline) or LangHeap becomes retainable; exported callback env-structs live in LangHeap under the round-2 closures floor; the handle table is a shared mutable language-side root. The control channel is unclosed: a foreign thread executing a language callback touches LangHeap by construction, and 'C001/C004 quantify over language threads only' is design stipulation, not card content (verified — neither card scopes to language threads; C004's confirmed scope is safe-Rust discipline with incorrect impls UB). Citation defect confirmed: F1 in verified-findings.md has no negative-scope field. The sole answer to its own charter-collision risk (arena residency for hot interop data) rests entirely on an uncarded GPU/heterogeneous precedent and forfeits F001/F002/F003 payoffs on exactly the data D0 exists for. The arena is not safety-free even if fact-free: two language threads racing through accessors is a D1-banned race, so checked-access vocabulary returns. Finally, D2 (2026-07-02) amends the 'verbosity is free' premise: marshalling code is now paid from a finite program token budget, unpriced.

positionAssessments.position: Position 2 — Declared trust contracts (per-extern effect/alias/lifetime/thread frames; conservative undeclared default; provenance-tainted trusted class)
positionAssessments.strengths: Its declaration VOCABULARY is the durable contribution: the threat-model FFI row names 'boundary contracts / conservative fallback' as the remedy verbatim, round2-modules line 25 makes contract-bearing signatures non-optional, and even P3 concedes any future scoped-escape relaxation must route through marked-assertion machinery — so every position eventually needs P2's schema (reads/writes/escapes/threads/no-unwind/re-entry). It is right that an ambient ABI-trust floor exists under every rival and that the ownership floor forces stating the post-call borrow state of anything passed out. C004's 2026-07-02 confirmation strengthens its best precedent: the reference bar itself ships with declared-surface residual unsoundness of exactly this shape. It is the only position with any audit/attribution story, and the only one that names process/SFI isolation as an expressible bottom tier — the sole mechanism that would strengthen rather than restate the D1 envelope.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: Its legality claim fails as stated: 'exactly one sanctioned third class' is unsupported — the verification spine verbatim denies any third state, so the position needs a formal spine amendment it pretends already exists, and it repurposes round2-modules line 25 while deleting that line's content (re-verified against BODIES every build — the redundancy IS the point; no body exists at the wall). It fails the admission condition of the round-1 tier it cites as license: marked assertions must be 'dynamically checkable in debug builds', and its own evidence-gap list concedes whole-execution wall properties (escape, thread-publication) have no carded runtime check and no sanitizer cards exist. Its forcing argument ('pure conservatism is inexpressible under the ownership floor') is refuted by the uniform post-state rule — treat every crossing as escape to pre-declared foreign-shared storage, which P1 and P3 both instantiate. The computable-taint auditability claim has no carded mechanism through lowering (misleading-comparisons #5; uncarded Rust-noalias incident history), and N001 implies the taint frontier can be the entire optimization horizon. Worst structural fact: the wall is the one place with no body to re-check a declaration against, so round2-modules' coherent-hallucination failure mode has, by definition, no redundancy channel here.

positionAssessments.position: Position 3 — Runtime barrier (conservative invalidation at each crossing; permanent demotion of escaped memory; sanitizer dev builds)
positionAssessments.strengths: Closest to what decided law already forces as the DEFAULT: the conservative-fallback branch of the threat-model remedy, trilaterally converged in round 1; C003 cards the barrier discipline as precedented production-compiler machinery, not novel apparatus; the omission-is-sound structure (F003 contrapositive, N001) gives crossings the correct failure asymmetry — imprecision costs optimization, not soundness (with the provenance caveat below). Its partition insight is the real cash value of the modules cut: the closed world makes the invalidation set bounded rather than total, preserving F001/F002-class facts at full strength over the FFI-unreachable interior. It preserves zero-copy with the dossier's named targets, and it composes cleanly with the abort-at-boundary unwind rule into one coherent wall semantics.
positionAssessments.weaknesses: 'Withdrawal is the unique lawful attenuation' is the mirror-image of P2's overclaim: the spine is a synthesis sketch item coupled to research_needed ir-strategy, not an enumerated floor, and line 23 of the same document says 'declared fact-attenuation'; its own concessions then reintroduce marked-assertion relaxations, reducing the disagreement with P2 to defaults and gating. Permanent demotion as specified violates the floors it invokes — a compiler-inferred, call-site-triggered rewrite of a writer-stated storage contract collides with the explicit-storage-contract floor, zero-cross-boundary-inference, and contract-edit gating, and is ownership-incoherent for borrowed crossings; repaired, it converges to pre-declared foreign-shared allocations, i.e., P1's residency. Its soundness story silently depends on the int-ptr/provenance ban it never states: without it, reachable-set completeness fails and 'imprecision never costs soundness' is false (threat-model row 2: 'often no'). C005 is overread (undef uses can be UB downstream; D1 forces atomic-grade demoted access regardless, which the risks section admits and the core argument denies). The cost headline is contradicted by its own concession that true declared contracts soundly recover optimization on fine-grained hot-loop FFI, and its staging mitigation IS copying. Sanitizer channel entirely uncarded and structurally partial. D2 also prices its 'verbose mechanical rewrites for free' claim.

keyTradeoffs: Facts vs copies vs trust — the actual triangle: residency/quarantine preserves F001/F002/F003 non-interference facts across every extern call for all LangHeap but forfeits all interior facts on foreign-resident data and pays unquantified copies; barrier/demotion preserves zero-copy but forfeits facts on the escaped set and pins motion at crossings; declared relaxations recover both at the price of an unverifiable trust surface with N001-unbounded blast radius when wrong. Zero cost quantification exists anywhere in the corpus to price any corner of this triangle (caveats.md).

Failure asymmetry is the decisive soundness variable: partition/barrier/quarantine imprecision degrades optimization only IF the foreign-reachable set is a guaranteed over-approximation — which holds only under a LangHeap int-ptr laundering ban or provenance rule (threat-model row 2). Declared-contract imprecision is a silent, non-local miscompile. This asymmetry is what D1 forces the DEFAULT to be withdrawal-shaped; it does not by itself forbid a checkable marked-assertion tier later.

Auditability vs nothing-to-audit: withdrawal designs have no trusted artifacts but also no attribution channel when the ambient ABI axiom is violated (foreign scribble manifests as a mis-attributed trap in innocent code); declaration designs have an enumerable audit surface but no carded taint mechanism through the pass pipeline. Post-violation attribution at the wall is undesigned under every position.

The D1 envelope is identical across all three positions — 'impossible in accepted programs, conditional on ABI-well-behaved foreign code and the (undelimited) runtime TCB', Rust's shipped envelope — so advertised D1-composition or D1-by-construction differentiators are category errors (critic confirmed). Only hardware/OS isolation (process, MPK, CHERI) strengthens the claim itself, and it has zero cards; only P2 even names it as an expressible tier.

Token budgets (new, unpriced by all parties): D2 (2026-07-02) amends round-2's 'verbosity is free' — quarantine's marshalling/accessor code and the barrier's staging rewrites are paid from the finite PROGRAM budget, while P2's declaration vocabulary is paid from the SPEC budget. The wall design now has a teachability cost dimension no advocate priced.

Procedural deadlock: round2-modules line 24 requires the attenuation design BEFORE the closed-world commitment hardens, while caveats.md's standing rule plus ffi_abi_runtime (missing_primary_source, priority-high) forbid promoting any design now. The only lawful resolution is a provisional skeleton with pre-committed reopen triggers, not promotion — and the synthesis line-23 ('declared fact-attenuation') vs line-33 ('no third state') contradiction must be resolved by formal amendment, since every position was built by reading only one of the two lines.
evidenceGaps: ffi_abi_runtime (backlog line 6): missing_primary_source, priority-high — zero carded primary sources on ABI, unwinding boundaries, GC statepoints, pinning, or C/C++/Rust/Fortran/Python-extension interop; per decision-gates this alone blocks design_candidate status for ANY wall design.

Zero quantified copy/marshalling/barrier/demotion/contract-relaxation costs, and no workload census of large-buffer in-place vs thin-edge FFI in optimizer-first code — the single most decision-capable missing measurement (all three positions concede it).

No cards on the direct precedent family: JNI local/global refs and GetPrimitiveArrayCritical, .NET GCHandle pinning, Go cgo pointer rules, Erlang NIFs/ports, Wasm linear-memory sandboxing, CUDA/HIP device-handle interop — simultaneously quarantine's best precedent and its best counter-evidence (historical pinning-escape-hatch erosion).

No sanitizer/dynamic-checkability cards of any kind: whether TSan/ASan/Miri-class instrumentation can falsify a wrong reads/writes/escapes/threads wall declaration, at what cost — this single gap decides whether P2's trusted tier can EVER meet the round-1 marked-assertion admission condition ('dynamically checkable in debug builds').
Provenance/int-ptr rules unanswered (memory-object-model.md open questions): load-bearing for P1's syntactic check AND P3's reachable-set completeness; without a ruling, no wall design is sound.

Foreign threads executing language callbacks: no card defines what C004-class capability predicates mean for threads the runtime did not create, whether callback entry needs a thread-identity check, or the env-struct residency of exported callbacks under the closures floor — the closed-world reopen trigger arriving through the wall.

Inbound direction entirely undesigned: no threat-model row for foreign-supplied values (uninitialized buffers, invalid representations, aliasing-contradictory out-params); D1 bans uninitialized reads, and language-side marshalling from a never-written foreign buffer is exactly such a read.

Handle-table/accessor mechanics uncarded (generation-check costs, ABA), and quarantine's own infrastructure depends on the uncarded interior-mutability vs shared-reference-noalias tension backlog item.

Rust noalias enable/disable/miscompile incident history (named gap in round1-ir-strategy and round2-modules): the closest real-world evidence for the fact-falsification class at stake and for whether declaration-derived metadata stays attributable through lowering.
C002's UB-vs-bounded race semantics for foreign-shared/demoted memory remains open and couples to research_needed concurrency-model; the wall cannot fully close before it.
TCB never delimited: allocator, scheduler/runtime, and OS syscalls are foreign code beneath LangHeap that do not cross 'the wall'; the ambient ABI axiom is really an unwritten TCB declaration.

All AI-writer behavioral claims on every side (marshalling verbosity acceptable, declaration hallucination rates, batching/staging discipline, drift in boundary code) are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — zero AI-codegen evidence in the corpus — and D2's token-budget pricing of boundary verbosity is likewise unmeasured.
result.leadingCandidate: Composite conservative-by-default declared wall (P3's barrier as repaired by critique + P1's residency + P2's vocabulary at its conservative bottom): every extern crossing carries a mandatory machine-readable declaration frame (reads/writes/escapes/threads/no-unwind/re-entry) — satisfying synthesis line 23 and round2-modules line 25 — but the only verifier-admissible frame is currently the maximally conservative one, preserving the line-33 no-third-state spine; C003-style barrier semantics at every crossing; any memory foreign code may retain must be PRE-DECLARED foreign-shared at its allocation site under the existing storage-contract floor (P1's arena residency and P3's demotion, repaired, are the same mechanism — compiler-inferred call-site demotion is rejected as a floor violation); mandatory LangHeap pointer-integer laundering ban / provenance rule as a forced companion decision; foreign unwinds abort at the boundary. Two knobs remain genuinely open and go to research, not debate: (a) whether non-foreign-shared LangHeap pointers may transiently cross under a no-retention obligation, and (b) whether per-function trusted relaxations are ever admitted — lawful only through the round-1 marked-assertion tier and only if sanitizer-class dynamic checkability is first carded. The honest envelope statement ships with it: D1 holds conditional on ABI-well-behaved foreign code and a delimited runtime TCB, identical across all designs.
result.rationale: The debate's real finding, surfaced by the critic and confirmed against the texts, is that the three positions are one design with different defaults: once P3's permanent demotion is repaired to respect the explicit-storage-contract and zero-cross-boundary-inference floors it becomes pre-declared foreign-shared allocation, which IS P1's arena residency, which IS P2's escape dimension at its conservative bottom; and the direct answer to the debate question is the same under all three — the wall prevents falsification of internal proofs by (1) the closed world eliminating every non-call channel (D008/D004/D007), (2) never letting the optimizer consume a fact whose truth quantifies over unseen foreign behavior (conservative frame + omission-is-sound, F003/N001), and (3) keeping foreign-retainable memory outside the proved fact domain by allocation-site declaration — while NOT preventing an ABI-misbehaved foreigner from scribbling on the address space, a residual every position shares and only uncarded hardware/OS isolation removes. D1 plus the round-2 floors force this skeleton decisively: the conservative default is round-1 trilateral consensus named in the threat model's own remedy column; the int-ptr ban is forced because without it barrier/quarantine imprecision becomes a soundness hole rather than an optimization loss; and trusted relaxations are currently inadmissible because they fail the round-1 marked-assertion tier's dynamic-checkability condition by P2's own evidence-gap list. But the outcome must be research_needed, not design_candidate_later: ffi_abi_runtime is missing_primary_source/priority-high and per decision-gates blocks promotion; every cost that would arbitrate the surviving knobs (copies vs barriers vs relaxations) is unquantified; the inbound direction, foreign-thread callbacks, and TCB delimitation are undesigned by all parties; and the corpus's own decided texts contradict each other at the wall (synthesis line 23 vs 33), requiring a formal amendment no verdict owns. The composite skeleton should be recorded as the leading candidate with pre-committed reopen triggers, which also discharges round2-modules' design-before-hardening ordering without violating the caveats standing rule.
followUps: Discharge ffi_abi_runtime (backlog line 6, priority-high) with the precedent family added explicitly: JNI local/global refs + GetPrimitiveArrayCritical, .NET GCHandle pinning, Go cgo pointer-passing rules, Erlang NIFs/ports, Wasm linear-memory sandboxing, CUDA/HIP device-handle interop, plus ABI/unwinding/GC-statepoint/pinning primary sources — these directly arbitrate the quarantine-vs-pinning-erosion question and are prerequisite to promoting any wall design.

Issue a formal amendment ruling reconciling round2-synthesis-minimal-core.md line 23 ('declared fact-attenuation') with line 33 ('no third state between checked-redundant and unsound-assumed'), and assign an owner. Proposed resolution to evaluate: mandatory declaration vocabulary at every extern crossing with only the conservative frame admissible until dynamic-checkability evidence exists — declarations as schema now, trust as a gated later tier.

Rule on LangHeap pointer-to-integer conversion (memory-object-model.md provenance questions; threat-model row 2) as a forced companion decision: ban or provenance-track for any value crossing the wall. Record that every wall design is unsound without it.

Add three threat-model rows and design them: (a) inbound foreign-supplied values (uninitialized/invalid-representation/aliasing-contradictory — a direct D1 exposure via uninitialized reads), (b) foreign threads executing language callbacks (capability state of runtime-foreign threads, callback-entry identity checks, env-struct residency under the closures floor), (c) TCB delimitation (allocator/scheduler/OS beneath LangHeap, outside the wall).

Decide the two residual knobs as separate questions, jointly with the sibling round-3 unsafe-escape-hatch topic (round2-modules line 42 groups unsafe regions, FFI extern regions, and reflection grants as one fact-boundary construct family): (a) transient no-retention crossings of non-foreign-shared LangHeap pointers, (b) existence and checkability tier of per-function trusted relaxations.

Card sanitizer/interceptor detectability of false wall declarations (escape, thread-publication, out-of-frame writes) — this single artifact decides whether P2's trusted tier can ever satisfy the round-1 marked-assertion admission condition, and doubles as the barrier position's dev-build detection story.

Produce the three-way interop benchmark named independently by two positions: conservative barrier + pre-declared residency vs declared per-signature relaxations vs copy/handle marshalling, on GPU buffer sharing, syscall-heavy, and callback-driven kernels; measure runtime, escaped/resident-set size, optimization-loss radius, and — per D2 — the program-token cost of generated marshalling/staging code.

Specify the composite's undesigned interior: copy-buffer residency (the double-copy question), deep-copy semantics for crossing object graphs (identity/cycles/snapshot-vs-live), handle-table mechanics (generation checks, ABA), arena/demoted-memory access lowering against C002's open race-semantics question — and card the interior-mutability vs shared-reference-noalias tension item quarantine's own machinery depends on.

Card the Rust noalias enable/disable/miscompile incident history (already a named gap in round1-ir-strategy and round2-modules): it arbitrates both the fact-falsification blast-radius claims and whether declaration-derived metadata remains attributable through lowering (P2's taint-audit mechanism).

Write the honest D1 envelope statement into the safety-envelope record now, since it is position-invariant: memory/thread safety impossible in accepted programs CONDITIONAL on ABI-well-behaved foreign code and the declared TCB (Rust's shipped envelope); record process/MPK/CHERI isolation as the only mechanism that strengthens the conditional — uncarded — and keep P2's 'isolated' bottom-tier contract expressible so the escalation path exists.

Design the post-violation attribution channel for ABI-axiom violations (wall-crossing logging/telemetry feeding the machine-readable trap reports), since trap reports will otherwise systematically mis-attribute foreign scribbles to innocent internal code — the one observability hole no position addressed.

Re-run this topic once ffi_abi_runtime and the sanitizer/checkability cards exist, with the concurrency-model resolution as a declared joint dependency: round2-modules' reopen trigger (foreign threads / runtime loading) arrives through this wall, and the demoted/arena race semantics cannot close before C002's UB-vs-bounded question is decided.

envelopeArchitecture: LAYER 0 — PROVEN (assumed in every build mode, zero runtime cost). Contents: everything the deterministic checker derives from the decided floors — checked ownership/borrowing and storage/lifetime contracts (F001, F006, C004 now CONFIRMED_WITH_AMENDED_SOURCES 2026-07-02), Send/Sync-class capability predicates, mono-only generics checked once against declared bounds, exhaustive-match dispatch, closed-world whole-program facts (D004/D007/D008), and compiler-derived facts about constant data (metaprogramming law). Writer-stated intent facts at boundaries (ownership/aliasing capability, effect row, numeric mode, ABI-visible layout) are inputs re-verified against bodies every build — nothing writer-stated is ever trusted unchecked (verification spine). Two enlargement channels feed this layer: (a) an OPTIONAL per-fact-class stated-and-checked channel (loop invariants, ranges, loop-bounded disjointness, law obligations) — fact-creating for checker-underivable facts but always checked, never trusted (proof-burden ruling amendment 1); (b) a deterministically-budgeted solver PROMOTION stage that may enlarge the proven set on the performance ledger only — it never gates acceptance and never elides safety-relevant checks until a proof-producing-solver + small-independent-checker TCB design exists (proof-burden amendment 2).

LAYER 1 — CHECKED (runtime checks in ALL build modes; tested artifact = shipped artifact). Every unproven D1-critical checkable fact — array bounds, and alias-disjointness where a check form exists (A005 loop-bounded pointer-range guards only) — carries a runtime check lowering to the decided trap-with-report=abort; elimination only by Layer-0 proof. All checks, writer-spelled or compiler-derived, are surfaced as explicit ops in the canonical elaborated artifact plus machine-readable per-function check reports, on the round-2 MEMORY drop-op template; check-density/elision reports are the lint-class containment channel. Integer overflow is a POLICY class inside this layer, not a D1 class: named truthful modes are law, unproven nsw emission is spine-forbidden, unflagged wrap is a legal sound fallback, and the bare-'+' default binding stays with the open numeric-semantics question. Semantics identical across build modes is the target property, currently undefined at two points: relaxed-trap-ordering (vectorization legality of checked inner loops) and trap semantics under racing threads — both must be specified before this layer's spec closes.

LAYER 2 — GATED (the single boundary-construct family; the only home of trusted assertions). Exactly ONE family in core surface: unsafe regions, FFI extern declaration frames, trusted primitive/capability-base imports (mutex/atomic/allocator base impls per C004), and reflection capability grants (round2-modules line 59) — sharing one per-fact soundness-obligation ledger (the round1-ir-strategy artifact). A bare or manifest-free member is unrepresentable (P2's form); every entry carries content-addressed identity, provenance, rationale, and named obligations. The steady-state AI writer can neither author nor edit any member: authorship is a privileged, gated toolchain operation extending the decided contract-edit-gating floor, so NO writer-emittable believe-me construct exists anywhere in the language (P1's invariant preserved inside P3's skeleton). Discharge preference is mechanical: static proof > A005-style runtime check under trap=abort > machine-checked proof artifact; review-only authorization is confined to obligations with no mechanical discharge, quota-logged and density-measured per round2-memory-automation. One family + one ledger closes performance-pressure arbitrage between unsafe, FFI, and primitive channels.

LAYER 3 — QUARANTINED (the conservative wall; imprecision costs optimization, never soundness). Every extern crossing carries a mandatory machine-readable declaration frame (reads/writes/escapes/threads/no-unwind/re-entry — synthesis line 23, round2-modules line 25), but the only frame admissible to writer-reachable code is the maximally conservative one; any stronger frame exists only as a Layer-2 gated-family member with discharged ledger obligations. C003-style barrier semantics at every crossing; any memory foreign code may retain must be PRE-DECLARED foreign-shared at its allocation site as a field on the existing storage-contract floor (compiler-inferred call-site demotion is rejected as a floor violation); mandatory LangHeap pointer-integer laundering ban / provenance rule as the forced companion decision (without it, barrier imprecision becomes a soundness hole — threat-model row 2); foreign unwinds abort at the boundary. The closed world bounds the invalidation set: F001/F002-class facts hold at full strength over the FFI-unreachable interior.

LAYER 4 — AXIOMATIC (outside the envelope, honestly declared, not silently assumed). The ambient trust that no in-language mechanism discharges: ABI-well-behaved foreign code (a misbehaved foreigner can scribble on the address space under every design), and the delimited-but-currently-UNdelimited TCB — allocator, scheduler/runtime, OS syscalls beneath LangHeap, plus the compiler/verifier/checker implementation itself. The honest position-invariant envelope statement, recorded now: memory- and thread-safety bugs are impossible in accepted programs CONDITIONAL on ABI-well-behaved foreign code and the declared TCB — exactly Rust's shipped envelope (F001 reference bar). Only hardware/OS isolation (process, MPK, CHERI — zero cards) strengthens the conditional itself; P2-FFI's 'isolated' bottom-tier contract stays expressible so the escalation path exists.

CROSS-CUTTING INVARIANTS binding all layers: (1) writer-trust invariant — the steady-state AI writer never authors trust at any layer; every writer statement is checked, quarantined-conservative, or unrepresentable; (2) artifact honesty — every safety-relevant operation and fact source (checks, drops, frames, ledger entries, discharge records) is visible in the byte-canonical elaborated artifact and its machine-readable report family (check reports, lifetime reports, discharge ledger, wall-crossing logs feeding trap reports); (3) one gating regime — contract edits, boundary-family authorship, assume-mark addition, and FFI frame changes are all the same privileged toolchain operation; (4) acceptance is artifact-checkable, not process-relative — proof objects and check instrumentation travel with the program so D1's 'accepted programs' quantifier stays stable across toolchain versions.
decidedNow: D1 + spine + trap=abort force proven-else-checked for D1-critical checkable facts: an unproven bounds or alias-guard fact must be checked in ALL build modes, proven, or the program rejected — ambient assumption is excluded; failure semantics is trap-with-report=abort. This floor is benchmark-robust: no cost measurement can reopen ambient assume, only route pressure into proof, restructure, or the gated family.

No free-form writer-emittable unsafe block exists in any admissible design — forced jointly by the verification spine (no third state), the contract-edit-gating floor a fortiori, N001's unbounded blast radius, and D0's least-trusted-writer premise; no advocate in any of the four debates actually defended one.

A hatch EXISTS, as exactly one gated fact-boundary construct family (unsafe regions + FFI extern frames + primitive/capability imports + reflection grants) with one per-fact obligation ledger; manifest-free members unrepresentable; authorship/editing is a gated toolchain operation the steady-state writer cannot perform. Existence is forced: round1-concurrency's 'trusted-base placement, not elimination', C004's base impls, and the threat model's unverifiable rows mean something hatch-shaped is authored somewhere; in-language placement preserves partial verifiability (threat-model 'sometimes no') that FFI relocation forfeits ('no').

All checks are artifact-surfaced on the MEMORY drop-op template: compiler-derived-but-artifact-honest operations are decided law's own pattern, so 'checks visible in the elaborated artifact' is entailed by canonical form — and 'no compiler-inserted check' (check-policy P3) is not. Machine-readable per-function check reports join the report family now.

Conservative no-emit fallback is law where no check form exists (general whole-execution noalias, purity) and at FFI/int-ptr boundaries — round-1 trilateral consensus, threat-model remedy column, reaffirmed by all four rulings.

Overflow is classified now as a non-D1-critical policy class: unflagged wrap is a sound, spine-compliant fallback (N002); unproven nsw emission is forbidden; any unchecked/assume mode must live in the gated family (instantiating the numeric-semantics backlog note 'unsafe/proof-gated'). Only the bare-'+' default binding remains open.

Mandatory FFI declaration frames at every extern crossing, with only the maximally conservative frame admissible outside the gated family; C003 barrier semantics; foreign unwinds abort at the boundary (hardening the previously provisional round-2 cut-list line).

Foreign-retainable memory is pre-declared foreign-shared at its allocation site — one field on the existing writer-stated storage-contract floor; compiler-inferred call-site demotion is REJECTED (violates explicit-storage-contract, zero-cross-boundary-inference, and contract-edit gating). The LangHeap pointer-integer laundering ban / provenance rule is adopted as a forced companion decision: every wall design is unsound without it.

Mandatory writer proof burden = exactly the decided round-2 floors and nothing more; nothing writer-stated is ever load-bearing unchecked. The stated-and-checked channel above the floor is OPTIONAL and per-fact-class; P1-style mandatory proof-carrying source is ineligible as a mandate (violates the compiler-derived-constant-facts law as written, non-canonicalizable proof surface, and D2's amended verbosity budget).

Solver placement is fenced now: a deterministically-budgeted (rlimit-class, pinned-version) solver may only PROMOTE facts on the performance ledger; it never gates acceptance and never elides safety-relevant checks until a proof-checker TCB design exists. 'Elimination only by proof' in the check layer means deterministic-checker-grade or verified-proof-artifact discharge, not raw SMT output.

The honest conditional envelope statement (Layer 4) is written into the safety-envelope record NOW — it is position-invariant across every design considered in all four debates, so nothing is lost by recording it before the pending D1-quantifier owner ruling.

One formal spine amendment is adopted as the single reconciling legislative act (see interactions): 'no third state' is restated as 'no WRITER-EMITTABLE third state; toolchain-gated ledger entries are the sole trusted-assertion class, named, quarantined, discharge-preferred-mechanical, quota-logged, density-measured'. This simultaneously resolves synthesis line 23 vs line 33, check-policy's T2 remand, and the hatch ruling's review-only residue — three rulings, one amendment.

Until that amendment is formally issued and its preconditions carded, the operative default is the strictest reading: proven-else-checked with no trap-free assume anywhere, conservative-only FFI frames, and a near-empty gated set (bootstrap primitive base only).
interactions: COMPOSITION VERDICT: the four rulings compose into one architecture without contradiction, given ONE formal spine amendment, THREE ordering constraints, and TWO shared blockers — every apparent conflict resolves to the same construct viewed from a different debate.

Check-policy's T2 remand → hatch ruling, resolved: check-policy remanded any trap-free marked-assume tier to the safety-envelope debate under four preconditions (hatch lands, spine amendment, gated mark-addition, carded debug-check). The hatch ruling answers: the gated family IS the only home for trap-free assumption, and writer-inaccessibility satisfies precondition (iii) more strongly than requested. Precondition (iv) — carded debug-checkability — remains unsatisfied, so the trap-free tier inside the family is currently restricted to obligations with mechanical discharge; review-only residue is admissible only under the amendment's quota/density regime. No writer-emitted T2 ever exists: P2-check-policy's tier is dead as a writer surface and reborn as a toolchain surface.

Hatch ↔ FFI: one family, one ledger — and therefore one blocking dependency. The hatch verdict requires FFI extern frames to be family members sharing the obligation ledger, but ffi-attenuation is research_needed with ffi_abi_runtime missing_primary_source (priority-high). Composition is coherent but ORDERED: the ledger's fact-attenuation vocabulary cannot be written before the wall's semantics exist, so the hatch stays design_candidate_later until ffi_abi_runtime discharges. The FFI ruling's conservative-only-frame rule and the hatch's gated-stronger-frames rule dovetail exactly: conservative frames are the writer-reachable default; non-conservative frames are gated-family members with discharged obligations.

Proof-burden ↔ hatch ↔ check-policy triangle: the optional stated-and-checked channel is one mechanism with three consumers — it supplies elimination fuel for Layer-1 checks ('elimination only by proof'), the preferred discharge mechanism for Layer-2 ledger obligations (prover-gated), and the fact-creating route past checker decidability that keeps D0 performance reachable without trust. The solver fence (proof-burden) and 'elimination only by proof' (check-policy) are consistent once 'proof' is defined as deterministic-checker or verified-proof-artifact — this definition is legislated in decidedNow item 10 and must appear in the spine amendment.

Spine contradiction resolved once for all four rulings: synthesis line 23 ('declared fact-attenuation') vs line 33 ('no third state') was independently flagged by the ffi and hatch debates and silently strained by check-policy's remand. The single amendment — declarations as mandatory schema, conservative frames now, trusted entries only as gated-family ledger members — is the unique resolution all four rulings converge on; issuing it three separate times per-topic would recreate the near-duplicate-machinery drift the charter forbids.

Gating regime unification: contract-edit gating (decided floor), boundary-family authorship (hatch), assume-mark addition (check-policy precondition), FFI frame edits (ffi), and boundary-visible proof-channel contracts (proof-burden follow-up) are ONE privileged toolchain operation with one audit trail. Interior invariant weakening stays lint-class (strength erosion is a performance event, not soundness laundering) — the proof-burden critic's category distinction is adopted architecture-wide.

Per-fact-class decomposition is the shared spine of all four rulings and composes cleanly: bounds (checkable → Layer 1), overflow (sound wrap fallback → policy class), loop-bounded disjointness (A005-checkable → Layer 1), whole-execution noalias/purity/Send (no carded check → conservative Layer 3 or gated Layer 2), FFI wall properties (unverifiable → conservative frame). The uniform-policy category error round-1 warned about is avoided because each ruling assigns classes to layers by checkability, and no class is assigned to two layers inconsistently.

Shared blockers (not contradictions): (a) the interior-mutability / shared-reference-noalias tension card (misleading-comparisons #2) blocks the type-level half of the hatch (UnsafeCell-analog for mutex/atomic/channel signatures) AND the FFI quarantine's accessor machinery — one card unblocks both; (b) concurrent-trap semantics (round-2 debt) caps Layer-1's failure story AND the demoted/foreign-shared race semantics (C002 open) — one spec closes both.

Ordering constraints that sequence round 3+: (1) ffi_abi_runtime before hatch finalization (ledger vocabulary dependency); (2) the D1-quantifier owner ruling before selecting between the P1-collapse (near-empty gated set) and the operating gated regime — it arbitrates hatch form and nothing else blocks on it; (3) relaxed-trap-ordering + concurrent-trap specs before Layer-1's 'identical semantics in all modes' is a defined claim; (4) bounds/overflow runtime-check policy is already decided BEFORE hatch finalization (as the hatch ruling requested), shrinking the hatch's residual domain to precisely the aliasing/lifetime/capability class with no carded dynamic check.

D2 interaction (favorable, unmeasured): the composite pushes annotation weight toward compiler-elaborated artifacts and toolchain compute — checks compiler-derived-and-surfaced, frames machine-readable schema, manifests toolchain-authored, solver burden CPU-side — which spends the admissible cost channels and spares the SPEC/PROGRAM token budgets D2 made first-class. But marshalling/staging code at the wall and any annotation vocabulary still draw on the program budget, unpriced; no composition claim here is measured.

One genuine residual tension, named not hidden: acceptance stability vs the gated channel. Gate policy, keyring, and ledger versions make Layer-2 membership process-relative, while D1's quantifier wants artifact-checkable acceptance. The composite's mitigation — proof objects and check instrumentation travel with the artifact; review-only entries carry content-addressed ledger records — narrows but does not eliminate the time-relativity for review-only residue. This is honestly a property the pending D1-quantifier ruling must bless or reject; it is the only place the four rulings' composition depends on a normative call rather than design.
residualUnsoundness: ABI-misbehaved foreign code: a foreigner that violates the call-boundary axiom can scribble on the entire address space under EVERY design — blast radius unbounded in principle, identical to Rust's shipped envelope (F001 bar). Only uncarded hardware/OS isolation (process/MPK/CHERI) removes it. Size: unquantifiable until the interop workload census exists; position-invariant, so it prices no design choice.

Undelimited TCB: allocator, scheduler/runtime, OS syscalls beneath LangHeap, plus compiler/verifier/checker implementations, are trusted with no written declaration. Size unknown and currently unbounded-by-omission; the hatch ruling's frontier-sizing decides whether the primitive base is 'a standard library' or 'a second evidence-free language'. No card exists on checker/TCB defect history — every TCB-growth argument in the corpus is structural reasoning.

Review-only gated residue: ledger obligations with no mechanical discharge (whole-execution noalias, purity, Send/Sync base-impl claims, non-conservative FFI frames) are relocated trust — review, human or AI, is a trusted assertion (P3 critic, confirmed). Size = frontier size, THE decisive unmeasured variable named by round1-aliasing, memory-automation's reopening clause, and the backlog; same-model review shares correlated errors (unresolved).

Obligation-generation completeness: a missed obligation class is a hole no checker, prover, or gate closes — the SHARED soundness surface under all four rulings. Zero cards, no validation plan. Size: unknown; it dominates every layer's soundness story and is the architecture's single largest unexamined surface.

Caller-drift falsification of boundary assertions: whole-program regeneration rewrites safe code around hash-stable Layer-2 regions whose context-dependent assertions (noalias, non-escape, Send) can be falsified by new callers while every provenance and hash check passes. Re-validation triggers are undesigned for ALL forms. Size: scales with regeneration frequency — plausibly the highest-probability real-world breach channel for an AI-regenerated codebase, and completely unmeasured.

Inbound FFI direction: foreign-supplied values (uninitialized buffers, invalid representations, aliasing-contradictory out-params) have no threat-model row and no design; language-side marshalling from a never-written foreign buffer is literally a D1-banned uninitialized read. Size: every inbound crossing until designed — a hole in the wall, not a conditional axiom.

Foreign threads executing language callbacks: touch LangHeap by construction; no card defines capability predicates for runtime-foreign threads, callback-entry identity checks, or exported-callback env-struct residency under the closures floor. This is the closed-world reopen trigger arriving through the wall. Size: every callback-driven interop workload.

Trap semantics under racing threads: unspecified (round-2 debt, answered by no position) — abort ordering, report atomicity, traps on FFI-introduced threads. Caps the failure/observability story of Layer 1 at the boundary. Size: bounded (it is a spec hole, not a mechanism hole) but blocks the check tier's spec from closing.

Relaxed-trap-ordering: absent a sound spec validated against LLVM's speculation/side-effect model, either checked inner loops face a vectorization cliff (strict ordering — a D0 cost, not unsoundness) or a naive relaxation is itself a soundness bug. Size: bounded, prototype-gate class; but Layer 1's headline property is undefined until it lands.

Provenance/int-ptr rule: adopted as a decision but not yet designed (memory-object-model open questions). Until specified, reachable-set completeness fails and Layer-3 imprecision is a silent soundness hole rather than an optimization loss (threat-model row 2 'often no'). Size: the entire wall until ruled.

Post-violation attribution hole: an ABI-axiom violation manifests as a mis-attributed trap in innocent internal code — an observability defect, not a new unsoundness, but it silently corrupts the audit/blame channel every gated-residue argument leans on. Wall-crossing logging is undesigned.

Interior-mutability capability type: every position's mutex/atomic/channel signatures need an UnsafeCell-analog whose tension with shared-reference-noalias is uncarded (misleading-comparisons #2); round2-memory-automation bars admitting it before carding. Until then the type-level half of the escape envelope is an IOU sitting inside the primitive base.

Verifier/solver trust-path creep: the solver fence is asserted design, not implemented mechanism; if solver-discharged facts ever elide safety checks before the proof-checker TCB exists, a solver bug becomes a D1-class breach. Size: zero if the fence holds; the fence itself is unenforced until built.

Honest global sizing statement: no residual surface above is quantified anywhere in the corpus (caveats.md); the three that dominate expected risk — frontier size, obligation completeness, caller-drift revalidation — are respectively unmeasured, unexamined, and undesigned. All AI-writer behavioral claims touching these surfaces remain EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED (round-2 standing flag, zero AI-codegen evidence).

AI-writer safety-envelope experiment battery (extends the round-2 flagship drift experiment and modules follow-up d; merges hatch, check-policy, and proof-burden writer experiments): inject known-unsound regions → manifest-mismatch detection and vacuous-rationale rates; gate-request and laundering behavior under quota pressure; rejection-pressure restructure vs checked-op spam vs marked-assume regimes on identical kernels; prover-assisted obligation-discharge success; VC-repair-loop fix rates on failed obligations vs type errors vs restructure demands; weak-invariant equilibrium probe under lint pressure.
